texto: There is nothing in this life that can destroy you but yourself. Bad things happen to everyone, but when they do, you can't just fall apart and die. You have to fight back. If you don't, you're the one who loses in the end. But if you do keep going and fight back, you win.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Alexandra Monir sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “There is nothing in this life that can destroy you but yourself. Bad things happen to everyone, b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, coragem, losing, útil em momentos de termino e losing.
